description_long: This is an adult woman with a casual urban appearance, standing upright with arms slightly extended to the sides. She is dressed in a fitted V-neck top and a pair of straight-cut jeans that appear slightly faded at the bottom. Her feet are clad in open-toed sandals, and her hair is styled in a neat ponytail at the back of her head. The facial features are realistic, with a neutral expression and natural proportions. The clothing fits closely to the body, and the overall build is average, suggesting a healthy adult. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the figure is suitable for representing a pedestrian in a city or neighborhood environment.
description: A casually dressed adult woman standing upright, wearing a V-neck top, jeans, sandals, and a ponytail hairstyle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the V-neck top, facial features, and open-toed sandals.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the ponytail and the profile of the face and body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the top, jeans, and ponytail.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the body profile and ponytail from the opposite side.
attribute_clothing_type: casual V-neck top and straight-cut jeans
